overall.description: First-person exploration through an abandoned futuristic stadium complex in a video game, featuring sandy terrain, crashed structures with holographic advertisements, crystalline monuments, and ascending outdoor stairs toward a building entrance.

events.description: camera moves past the red military truck on the right side

agents.ego_description: moving along the dirt path beside a crashed stadium structure with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: red military truck moving slowly forward along the path

entered.detail: large curved building with broken holographic displays showing 'MERRY' text
tall futuristic spires with crystalline appearance in the distance
orange heavy machinery left derelict on the ground
six-wheeled military transport vehicle with canvas cover

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a post-apocalyptic stadium exterior with a massive crashed structure on the right displaying holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward along a dirt path, passing an abandoned orange construction vehicle on the left and overtaking a red military truck moving slowly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to crystalline monument with stairway

events.description: turning left to navigate around the parked truck
beginning ascent of the outdoor concrete stairway

agents.ego_description: turning left around the red truck and beginning to approach the outdoor stairway leading upward

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to the upper plaza
large teal-colored building with columns and golden statues on the roof

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left around the truck, leaving the crashed structure behind, and approaches a wide outdoor stairway. The crystalline spires shift to the left as the green stadium building with golden rooftop statues becomes prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with red and white barricades

events.description: passing between red and white striped barricades on both sides

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide outdoor staircase flanked by construction barricades and metal railings

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the stairs
silver metal handrails along the stair edges

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairway, passing between red and white barricades. The green stadium building draws closer on the right while the crystalline monument recedes to the left background, and metal railings appear along the stair edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with stadium entrance and abandoned vehicles

events.description: encountering an NPC standing beside a blue car near the entrance

agents.ego_description: moving across the upper plaza toward the stadium entrance, passing a person standing beside a blue car

notable_agents.action: person in green clothing standing beside a blue car near the building entrance

entered.detail: abandoned blue sedan with open doors
building entrance with 'STAL' signage and graffiti-covered walls
wrecked car and rubble near the stairs
tall crane visible behind the stadium building

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the camera enters an open plaza with the green stadium building now directly ahead. A blue car sits on the right with a person standing beside it, while the entrance with graffiti and signage comes into view. Construction cranes are visible in the background against the afternoon sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate stadium exterior through a series of obstacles toward the entrance of a massive green building. It begins on a dirt path beside a crashed structure with holographic advertisements, passing an abandoned orange construction vehicle and a slow-moving red military truck. As the camera turns left to leave the wreckage behind, the view shifts toward a wide outdoor stairway while crystalline spires recede into the distance. The scene then ascends the concrete stairs between red and white barricades, with the green stadium building and its golden rooftop statues growing more prominent on the right. Finally, the camera reaches the top of the stairs to enter an open plaza, passing a blue car and a standing figure before facing the graffiti-covered entrance under a sky filled with distant construction cranes.
